model.provider_desc: Select the base Artificial Intelligence engine.
model.model_desc: The specific variant or version of the selected engine.
model.system_prompt_desc: Defines the personality, rules, and core behavior of the assistant.
model.initial_msg_desc: The first thing the assistant will say when the call connects.
model.start_mode_desc: Who initiates the interaction when the call is answered?
model.response_length_desc: Adjusts how extensive or concise the assistant's replies will be.
model.tone_desc: Controls the emotional attitude of the assistant.
model.formality_desc: Adjusts the respect and linguistic formalism used.
model.pacing_desc: Controls latency and how quickly the agent assumes you finished speaking.
model.context_window_desc: How many previous messages the assistant will remember (1-50). Higher number = better memory but more token consumption.
model.frequency_penalty_desc: Prevents repeating the same words. 0 = no penalty, 2 = max penalty.
model.presence_penalty_desc: Encourages introducing new topics. 0 = no penalty, 2 = max diversity.
model.tool_strategy_desc: Controls when the assistant can use tools (transfer call, book appointment, etc).
model.max_tokens_desc: Hard limit on the maximum response length in tokens.
model.dynamic_vars_desc: Injects custom variables into the prompt in JSON format.
model.blacklist_placeholder: Banned words or phrases separated by comma...
model.blacklist_desc: The assistant will avoid generating these words (Stop Sequences).
model.hangup_enabled: Allow AI to hang up the call
model.hangup_enabled_desc: The Agent will use a secret tool to cut the call when saying goodbye or if necessary.
model.hangup_instructions_placeholder: Ex: If the client says they have no time, say 'Thanks for your time, have a great day' and hang up. Never beg.
model.hangup_instructions_desc: Trains the Agent indicating under which client behaviors or evasions it has permission to hang up.
model.hangup_keywords_placeholder: goodbye, bye, see you, not interested
model.hangup_keywords_desc: (Optional) If the AI pronounces these phrases at the end of its turn, the system will abruptly close the session. Separate with commas.

voice.title: Voice Configuration (TTS)
voice.language_desc: The Agent dictates the general language.
voice.norm_desc: Instructs the voice engine on how to process text or symbols before speaking them.
voice.latency_desc: Affects audio quality vs response speed.
voice.similarity_desc: Higher = More faithful to original voice.

transcriber.title: Transcription Configuration (STT)
transcriber.provider_desc: The transcription language and model used is auto-discovered for the general language of this Agent.
transcriber.endpointing_desc: Amount of silence time the bot should wait before interrupting to reply.
transcriber.blacklist_desc: Prevents the bot from cutting off if the user only makes a temporary "active listening" sound.

tools.title: Tools & Actions
tools.subtitle: Function Calling, n8n Webhooks and Client Tools.
tools.schema_desc: ⚠ Define the tool array compatible with OpenAI Function Calling format.
tools.async_desc: Frees audio while the tool is executing.
tools.invalid_json: Invalid JSON. Please check the syntax.
tools.client_tools_desc: Allows execution of local JS functions (popup, alert, nav).
tools.param_redac_desc: Keys to mask in logs (comma separated)
tools.state_injection_desc: Allows tools to modify the global context.

campaigns.title: Campaign Manager
campaigns.subtitle: Outbound calling and massive automation.
campaigns.blocked_msg: 🚫 Outbound campaigns are not available in Simulator mode.
campaigns.blocked_sub: Please connect Twilio or Telnyx to use this feature.
campaigns.warning_note: Note: Outbound campaigns are only available for Twilio and Telnyx providers.
campaigns.webhook_desc: A JSON report will be sent after each call finishes.

connectivity.title: Connectivity & Hardware
connectivity.subtitle: BYOC, SIP Trunking, Call Recording & Compliance (HIPAA).
connectivity.fallback_desc: If the bot fails, redirect the call here.
connectivity.browser_empty_desc: The Web Browser Agent uses WebRTC to communicate directly with your computer's microphone and speakers. Connection credentials or SIP Trunking are not required for this mode.
connectivity.caller_id_desc: Override the default Caller ID for this SIP trunk.
connectivity.test_call_desc: Perform a real test call to a phone number using this provider.
connectivity.sip_desc: Fill this out only if you are connecting on-premise infrastructure via SIP.

system.title: System & Governance
system.subtitle: Secure infrastructure (Safe Mode).
system.privacy_desc: Do not use data for training.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.subtitle: Fine-tuning of the voice engine and response times.
advanced.patience_desc: Defines how much silence the assistant waits for before responding. Low values make the chat fluid but risk interruptions.
advanced.audio_pstn_desc: Use PCMU for normal PSTN calls.
advanced.backchannel_desc: Allows the assistant to say "Uh-huh", "I see" while you speak.
advanced.same_msg_tooltip: This exact message will be used as an inactivity warning for each of the {{count}} maximum limited retries.
advanced.diff_msg_tooltip: This message will be dictated by the agent after exhausting the maximum time in the current inactivity retry.
